---
id: Q-002
question: What retry strategy should the checkout API use on downstream failures?
status: resolved
areas: [checkout]
asked_date: 2026-01-02
asked_slug: 2026-01-02-superseded-example
resolution: Exponential backoff with jitter, max 3 retries.
resolution_slug: 2026-01-03-replacement-example
---

## Resolution

Exponential backoff with jitter was chosen after reviewing failure patterns in staging.
Max 3 retries keeps the worst-case latency bounded. Documented in the replacement entry.
